response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or secure embedded systems, with most roles centered on web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and no demonstrable use of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols — critical for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and technical workshops
Experience with distributed systems and event-driven architectures
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL work; primary language is TypeScript/Node.js
No evidence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols
Lacks experience in on-premises industrial automation platforms or real-time systems
